notes: Phase 1 planning is in progress. 4 PLAN.md files created. Plan checker ran and found 6 blockers; 4 have been fixed. 2-3 remain before plans are ready for /gsd-execute-phase.

Fix blocker: FR-04 tests no longer have it.skip escape hatch (Plan 04)

remaining_tasks.name: Fix Plan 04 task 2: add web-ext lint for NFR-06 automated gate; remove E2E bail-out paragraph
Fix Plan 03 objective: document resolution of UI-SPEC §6 vs. Copywriting Contract contradiction
Update RESEARCH.md: change '## Open Questions' to '## Open Questions (RESOLVED)' with documented resolutions for all 3 questions
Re-run /gsd-plan-phase 01 to trigger plan checker again and confirm all blockers fixed
Update STATE.md status to READY_TO_EXECUTE after checker passes

blockers.description: Plan checker found 2 remaining blockers: (1) NFR-06 E2E can be fully skipped with no automated fallback; (2) UI-SPEC §6 contradiction silently adopted

blockers.description: RESEARCH.md ## Open Questions section not marked (RESOLVED)

decisions.rationale: Wave 0 scaffold → Wave 1 hibernation loop → Wave 2 popup UI → Wave 3 tests

decisions.decision: FR-04 tests use direct handleManualHibernate() testing
decisions.rationale: Avoids vitest-chrome callListeners API compatibility risk; reliable, no escape hatch

decisions.decision: Zero-state count display uses 'No tabs hibernated' prose
decisions.rationale: Adopts Copywriting Contract version over UI-SPEC §6 Component Spec; more user-friendly

decisions.decision: ensureHibernateAlarm() called at module top level in index.ts
decisions.rationale: RESEARCH.md Pitfall 1 — must run on every SW restart, not just onInstalled

next_action: Fix Plan 04 task 2 (NFR-06 web-ext lint), fix Plan 03 objective (UI-SPEC contradiction note), update RESEARCH.md open questions, then re-run /gsd-plan-phase 01 to verify checker passes
context_notes: Plans 01-04 are substantively complete and correct. The remaining 2-3 checker blockers are documentation-level fixes (adding a note, changing a section heading, removing a bail-out paragraph) — not architectural changes. Once fixed, the checker should pass and execution can begin.
